label: Biome
description: Defines a biome: world tile characteristics, wild flora and fauna, weather, terrain generation, and display properties for a RimWorld map.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# BiomeWorker type that implements biome selection scoring logic.

implemented.label: Implemented
implemented.description: When false, this biome is a placeholder and will not be used in world generation.

generatesNaturally.label: Generates naturally
generatesNaturally.description: When false, this biome is never placed by the world generator without explicit scripting.

canBuildBase.label: Can build base
canBuildBase.description: When false, players cannot establish a colony on tiles with this biome.

canAutoChoose.label: Can auto-choose
canAutoChoose.description: When false, the auto-select landing site logic will not choose tiles with this biome.

allowRoads.label: Allow roads
allowRoads.description: When false, roads cannot pass through tiles with this biome.

allowRivers.label: Allow rivers
allowRivers.description: When false, rivers cannot pass through tiles with this biome.

allowFarmingCamps.label: Allow farming camps
allowFarmingCamps.description: When false, farming camp sites cannot be placed on tiles with this biome.

animalDensity.label: Animal density
animalDensity.description: Base density of wild animals spawned on maps in this biome.

plantDensity.label: Plant density
plantDensity.description: Base density of wild plants grown on maps in this biome.

diseaseMtbDays.label: Disease MTB days
diseaseMtbDays.description: Mean time between disease outbreaks in days for this biome.

settlementSelectionWeight.label: Settlement selection weight
settlementSelectionWeight.description: Relative weight for AI faction settlement placement on tiles with this biome.

campSelectionWeight.label: Camp selection weight
campSelectionWeight.description: Relative weight for AI faction camp placement on tiles with this biome.

pollutionOffset.label: Pollution offset
pollutionOffset.description: Pollution level offset applied to tiles with this biome during world generation.

impassable.label: Impassable
impassable.description: When true, tiles with this biome cannot be traversed on the world map.

hasVirtualPlants.label: Has virtual plants
hasVirtualPlants.description: When true, the biome displays virtual plant sprites at the world map level even when no real plants are on the tile.

forageability.label: Forageability
forageability.description: Amount of food that can be foraged per forager per day on maps in this biome.

foragedFood.label: Foraged food
foragedFood.description: ThingDef produced by foraging in this biome.

wildPlantsCareAboutLocalFertility.label: Wild plants care about local fertility
wildPlantsCareAboutLocalFertility.description: When true, wild plant spawning is weighted by local cell fertility. When false, plants spawn uniformly.

wildPlantsAreCavePlants.label: Wild plants are cave plants
wildPlantsAreCavePlants.description: When true, wild plants in this biome use cave plant rules and can grow under roofs.

wildPlantRegrowDays.label: Wild plant regrow days
wildPlantRegrowDays.description: Mean time in days for wild plants to regrow after being destroyed in this biome.

movementDifficulty.label: Movement difficulty
movementDifficulty.description: World-map movement speed multiplier for pawns traveling through tiles with this biome. Higher values slow movement.

baseWeatherCommonalities.label: Base weather commonalities
baseWeatherCommonalities.description: Relative frequency weights for each WeatherDef in this biome. Each element name is the WeatherDef defName; scalar text is the commonality.

terrainsByFertility.label: Terrains by fertility
terrainsByFertility.description: Ordered list of terrain layers placed on map cells according to the cell fertility noise value.

soundsAmbient.label: Ambient sounds
soundsAmbient.description: SoundDefs played as ambient background audio on maps in this biome.

terrainPatchMakers.label: Terrain patch makers
terrainPatchMakers.description: Perlin-noise terrain patch generators applied during map generation in this biome.

wildPlants.label: Wild plants
wildPlants.description: Plants that can appear wild in this biome. Each element name is the ThingDef defName; scalar text is the commonality.

wildAnimals.label: Wild animals
wildAnimals.description: Animals that spawn wild in this biome. Each element name is the PawnKindDef defName; scalar text is the commonality.

pollutionWildAnimals.label: Pollution wild animals
pollutionWildAnimals.description: Animals that spawn wild in this biome when the tile is polluted (Biotech). Same format as wildAnimals.

coastalWildAnimals.label: Coastal wild animals
coastalWildAnimals.description: Animals that spawn on the coast of tiles with this biome (Odyssey). Same format as wildAnimals.

diseases.label: Diseases
diseases.description: Biome-specific disease commonality overrides for this biome.

allowedPackAnimals.label: Allowed pack animals
allowedPackAnimals.description: ThingDefs that can be used as pack animals by caravans in this biome. If empty, all pack animals are allowed.

hasBedrock.label: Has bedrock
hasBedrock.description: When true, bedrock is placed beneath the deep soil layer on maps in this biome.

isExtremeBiome.label: Is extreme biome
isExtremeBiome.description: When true, this biome is considered extreme (ice sheet, extreme desert) for difficulty and warning purposes.

isWaterBiome.label: Is water biome
isWaterBiome.description: When true, this biome is treated as an open-water biome (ocean, lake) for world map and travel logic.

allowPollution.label: Allow pollution
allowPollution.description: When false, tiles with this biome cannot be polluted (Biotech).

wildAnimalsCanWanderInto.label: Wild animals can wander into
wildAnimalsCanWanderInto.description: When false, wild animals will not wander into maps generated in this biome.

noAmbientWind.label: No ambient wind
noAmbientWind.description: When true, wind ambience is suppressed on maps in this biome.

inVacuum.label: In vacuum
inVacuum.description: When true, maps in this biome are in vacuum and require EVA suits for survival (Odyssey).

disableSkyLighting.label: Disable sky lighting
disableSkyLighting.description: When true, sky-based lighting is disabled on maps in this biome.

disableShadows.label: Disable shadows
disableShadows.description: When true, shadow rendering is disabled on maps in this biome.

noGravel.label: No gravel
noGravel.description: When true, gravel is not placed during map generation in this biome.

canExitMap.label: Can exit map
canExitMap.description: When false, pawns cannot exit the map at the edges on tiles with this biome.

onlyAllowWhitelistedArrivalModes.label: Only allow whitelisted arrival modes
onlyAllowWhitelistedArrivalModes.description: When true, only arrival modes explicitly whitelisted for this biome are available.

isBackgroundBiome.label: Is background biome
isBackgroundBiome.description: When true, this biome renders as a background world layer rather than a foreground tile biome.

wildAnimalScariaChance.label: Wild animal scaria chance
wildAnimalScariaChance.description: Probability (0-1) that wild animals spawning in this biome are infected with scaria.

geyserCountFactor.label: Geyser count factor
geyserCountFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the base number of geysers placed during map generation in this biome.

constantOutdoorTemperature.label: Constant outdoor temperature
constantOutdoorTemperature.description: If set, overrides all season and weather temperature variation with this fixed outdoor temperature (in Celsius). Leave unset to use normal temperature simulation.

coastalBeachTerrain.label: Coastal beach terrain
coastalBeachTerrain.description: TerrainDef placed on coastal beach cells adjacent to ocean water in this biome.

lakeBeachTerrain.label: Lake beach terrain
lakeBeachTerrain.description: TerrainDef placed on beach cells adjacent to lake water in this biome.

riverbankTerrain.label: Riverbank terrain
riverbankTerrain.description: TerrainDef placed on riverbank cells in this biome.

mudTerrain.label: Mud terrain
mudTerrain.description: TerrainDef used for mud cells in this biome.

gravelTerrain.label: Gravel terrain
gravelTerrain.description: TerrainDef used for gravel cells in this biome.

waterShallowTerrain.label: Shallow water terrain
waterShallowTerrain.description: TerrainDef used for shallow standing water cells in this biome.

waterDeepTerrain.label: Deep water terrain
waterDeepTerrain.description: TerrainDef used for deep standing water cells in this biome.

oceanShallowTerrain.label: Shallow ocean terrain
oceanShallowTerrain.description: TerrainDef used for shallow ocean cells in this biome.

oceanDeepTerrain.label: Deep ocean terrain
oceanDeepTerrain.description: TerrainDef used for deep ocean cells in this biome.

waterMovingShallowTerrain.label: Moving shallow water terrain
waterMovingShallowTerrain.description: TerrainDef used for shallow moving water cells (rivers) in this biome.

waterMovingChestDeepTerrain.label: Moving chest-deep water terrain
waterMovingChestDeepTerrain.description: TerrainDef used for chest-deep moving water cells (deep rivers) in this biome.

riverbankSizeRange.label: Riverbank size range
riverbankSizeRange.description: Integer range controlling the minimum and maximum width of riverbank terrain strips placed during map generation.

biomeMapConditions.label: Biome map conditions
biomeMapConditions.description: GameConditionDefs that are permanently active on maps in this biome.

extraGenSteps.label: Extra gen steps
extraGenSteps.description: Additional map generation steps run when generating maps in this biome.

preventGenSteps.label: Prevent gen steps
preventGenSteps.description: Map generation steps that are suppressed when generating maps in this biome.

extraRockTypes.label: Extra rock types
extraRockTypes.description: Additional ThingDefs (rock types) added to the rock selection pool for maps in this biome.

forceRockTypes.label: Force rock types
forceRockTypes.description: ThingDefs (rock types) that replace the world-tile rock selection entirely on maps in this biome.

maxFishPopulation.label: Max fish population
maxFishPopulation.description: Maximum number of fish that can be present at one time in a fishing zone on maps in this biome.

fishTypes.label: Fish types
fishTypes.description: Fish populations available in this biome, organized by water type and rarity tier (Odyssey).

layerWhitelist.label: Layer whitelist
layerWhitelist.description: If non-empty, this biome can only appear on these PlanetLayerDefs (Odyssey).

layerBlacklist.label: Layer blacklist
layerBlacklist.description: This biome cannot appear on any PlanetLayerDef in this list (Odyssey).

settleWarning.label: Settle warning
settleWarning.description: Translated warning message shown when a player attempts to settle on a tile with this biome.

fogOfWarColor.label: Fog of war color
fogOfWarColor.description: Color used for the fog of war overlay on maps in this biome. Leave unset to use the default color.

orbitalDebris.label: Orbital debris
orbitalDebris.description: OrbitalDebrisDef assigned to maps in this biome for orbital debris rendering (Odyssey).

texture.label: Texture
texture.description: Content path to the world map texture for this biome. Not translated.

basic-biome.label: Basic biome
basic-biome.description: Minimal biome with worker class, densities, and a texture.
